title: Set up a new laptop or peripheral device
body:
# Set up a new laptop or peripheral device

When you receive a new laptop or peripheral (monitor, dock, headset):

1. Unbox and connect the device, then power it on.
2. For laptops, sign in with your company account and let the mobile device management (MDM) profile install — this may take 15-20 minutes.
3. Verify required software (VPN client, security agent, productivity suite) installed automatically; if not, use the company software portal.
4. For peripherals, install any manufacturer drivers listed on the software portal.

If the MDM profile fails to install or a peripheral isn't recognized after a restart, open a hardware ticket with IT including the device's asset tag.
